_metadata.description: Seed data for the factions reference table

data.name: Autobot
data.notes: Heroic faction. Known as Cybertrons (サイバトロン) in Japan

data.name: Decepticon
data.notes: Villainous faction. Known as Destrons (デストロン) in Japan

data.name: Human
data.notes: Earth humans allied with or opposing Transformers

data.name: Quintesson
data.notes: Ancient alien race. Creators of the Transformers in G1 cartoon continuity

data.name: Junkion
data.notes: Scrap-metal robots from the planet Junkion. Allied with Autobots

data.name: Nebulan
data.notes: Humanoid aliens from Nebulos. Partners to Headmasters and Targetmasters in NA continuity. Not used in Japanese continuity (Headmasters are Cybertronians from planet Master)

data.name: Lithone
data.notes: Inhabitants of the planet Lithone, destroyed by Unicron in the 1986 movie

data.name: Neutral
data.notes: Characters not aligned with any faction. Includes Doubledealer, some JP characters

data.name: Other
data.notes: Characters from other alien races or unclassified factions

data.name: G.I. Joe
data.notes: Heroic military faction from G.I. Joe franchise

data.name: Cobra
data.notes: Villainous faction from G.I. Joe franchise
